name: Dub.co
description: Open-source link management platform. Shorten URLs, track analytics, manage custom domains, create QR codes, and run A/B tests on short links.

capabilities.name: links_create
capabilities.description: Create a new short link with optional custom domain, tags, geo-targeting, UTM parameters, and A/B testing.

capabilities.name: links_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of short links with optional filtering by domain, tags, folder, and search.

capabilities.name: links_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about a specific short link by link ID, external ID, or domain+key combination.

capabilities.name: links_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing short link's destination URL, tags, expiration, geo-targeting, or other properties.

capabilities.name: links_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an existing short link by its link ID or external ID.

capabilities.name: analytics_retrieve
capabilities.description: Retrieve analytics data for links including clicks, leads, and sales with flexible grouping by time, geography, device, or referrer.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of click, lead, or sale events with detailed filtering by link, geography, device, and UTM parameters.

capabilities.name: domains_create
capabilities.description: Add a custom domain to the workspace for use with short links.

capabilities.name: domains_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all custom domains in the workspace.

capabilities.name: domains_update
capabilities.description: Update a custom domain's settings including redirect URLs and archive status.

capabilities.name: domains_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a custom domain from the workspace.

capabilities.name: tags_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tag for organizing short links.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all tags in the workspace with optional search and pagination.

capabilities.name: tags_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing tag's name or color.

capabilities.name: tags_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an existing tag from the workspace.
